---
title: "Evidence to prioritise pop-up cycleways"
date: 2020-05-26
categories: [news]
tags: [cycling, cycleways, COVID]
description: "Talk on prioritising pop-up cycleways during the pandemic"
---

I gave a talk at the 'Ideas with Beers' seminar series on evidence to prioritise pop-up cycleways.

## Context

During COVID-19, there was urgent need for evidence to support rapid deployment of cycling infrastructure. The talk covered:

- Methods for identifying priority routes
- Using open data for quick analysis
- Case studies from the UK

## Key message

Pop-up cycleways can be implemented quickly and cheaply using evidence-based approaches. The Propensity to Cycle Tool methodology was adapted to support this work.

This led to the development of tools used by local authorities across the UK.
